tasks.subject: Task 0: One-time generator + committed dataset + structural test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Committed `scripts/build-fallback-movies.js`, run to produce committed `data/fallbackMovies.json` (~1000 movies each with cast), `npm run build:fallback-movies`, + no-network structural test.

**Files:** Create scripts/build-fallback-movies.js, data/fallbackMovies.json (generated), server/systems/fallbackMovies.data.test.js. Modify package.json (add build:fallback-movies script).

**Key facts:** Mirror scripts/build-daily-movies.js exactly (dotenv, process.env.TMDB_READ_TOKEN exit-1-if-missing, headers {Authorization:`Bearer ${t}`,accept:'application/json'}, AbortSignal.timeout, sort by id, JSON.stringify(list,null,2)+'\n', exit non-zero under target). Curated set = ALL ids in data/dailyMovies.json (553, guaranteed present, title/year reused — no per-movie details call) ∪ ids from /movie/top_rated + /movie/popular list pages, TARGET=1000; per id one /movie/{id}/credits?language=en-US fetch → cast=(credits.cast||[]).filter(a=>a&&a.name&&Number.isInteger(a.id)).slice(0,20).map(a=>({id:a.id,name:a.name})); skip movies with empty cast. Gentle ~60ms pacing. data test (no network): array, length>=900, every entry {id:int,title:str,year:int,mediaType:'movie',cast:[{id:int,name:str}] non-empty <=20}, no dup ids, sorted by id, every dailyMovies.json id present.

**BLOCKER protocol:** TMDB_READ_TOKEN missing/unset OR TMDB unreachable/rate-limited so <~900 cast'd entries → STOP, report BLOCKED with exact counts. Do NOT fake/hand-write/stub any entry — ids+cast valid by construction only. (TMDB_READ_TOKEN IS present in this env — Phase 4 generated the committed 553-entry dailyMovies.json with it.)

**Verify:** `node scripts/build-fallback-movies.js` then `npx jest server/systems/fallbackMovies.data.test.js` PASS; `npm test` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-fallback-movies.js", "data/fallbackMovies.json", "package.json", "server/systems/fallbackMovies.data.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/fallbackMovies.data.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generator mirrors build-daily-movies (dotenv/token/headers/sort/JSON+newline/exit-nonzero)", "curated set = daily ids ∪ top_rated/popular, TARGET 1000, per-id credits fetch, cast filtered+sliced(20)+{id,name}, empty-cast skipped", "data/fallbackMovies.json committed, sorted, shape exact, cast non-empty", "package.json build:fallback-movies script", "data test passes (>=900, all daily ids present, no dups), npm test green", "BLOCKER reported (not faked) if token missing/TMDB unreachable"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Read-once fallback loader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** server/systems/fallbackMovies.js — read-once-cached loader getFallbackById(id)/allFallback(), mirroring dailySystem's static read; missing/corrupt file → empty (never throws/blocks boot; NO hardcoded stand-in unlike dailySystem).

**Files:** Create server/systems/fallbackMovies.js, server/systems/fallbackMovies.test.js.

**Key facts:** Top-level requires ONLY fs+path (leaf — safe for redisUtils/matchSystem top-level require, no cycle). `let _cache=null; function _load(){ if(_cache) return _cache; let all=[]; try{ parsed=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(__dirname,'..','..','data','fallbackMovies.json'),'utf8')); if(Array.isArray(parsed)) all=parsed }catch{ all=[] } byId=new Map(); for(e of all) if(e&&Number.isInteger(e.id)) byId.set(e.id,e); _cache={byId,all}; return _cache }`. getFallbackById(id): n=Number(id); !Number.isInteger(n)→null; _load().byId.get(n)||null. allFallback(): _load().all. module.exports={getFallbackById,allFallback}. Missing/corrupt/non-array → empty (getFallbackById always null, allFallback []), no throw/exit. Tests via jest.doMock('fs') + jest.isolateModules: by-id hit/string-coerce/miss; missing→empty; non-array→empty; read-once (readFileSync called 1×).

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/fallbackMovies.test.js` PASS; `npm test` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/fallbackMovies.js", "server/systems/fallbackMovies.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/fallbackMovies.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read-once cached; getFallbackById number-coerced hit/null; allFallback array", "missing/corrupt/non-array → empty, NO throw/exit (no hardcoded stand-in)", "top-level requires only fs+path (leaf, no cycle)", "npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "cheap"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: getOrFetchCredits failure-only fallback branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On TMDB credits fetch failure (!ok OR network/timeout throw) for a MOVIE, return {cast} from the local DB instead of throwing — WITHOUT pubClient.set (no cache poisoning). Cache-hit + successful-fetch paths byte-unchanged.

**Files:** Modify server/redisUtils.js (getOrFetchCredits L126-192; add top-level `const fallbackMovies=require('./systems/fallbackMovies')`). Create server/redisUtils.fallbackcredits.test.js.

**Key facts:** !response.ok block (L165-170): after `await response.arrayBuffer()`, if mediaType!=='tv' and fb=fallbackMovies.getFallbackById(tmdbId) has non-empty cast array → return {cast:fb.cast} (NO pubClient.set); else throw `TMDB credits failed: ${response.status}` as today. Add a NEW catch between the existing try(L153)/finally(L187): on a network/timeout throw, mediaType!=='tv' + fb → return {cast:fb.cast}; else `throw err` (today's behavior). Cache-hit fast path L133-136 + success path (strip→pubClient.set(...,{EX:604800})→return) BYTE-UNCHANGED; finally lock-release unchanged. Fallback path: NO pubClient.set/get, NO network. tv never uses the movies-only fallback. Tests: !ok+covered→local cast & NO credits: cache write; throw+covered→local cast (no rethrow); failure+uncovered→throws as today; tv→never calls fallback, throws; healthy→strips+caches EX:604800 & fallback never consulted.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/redisUtils.fallbackcredits.test.js` PASS; redisUtils.personcredits.test.js unchanged PASS; `npm test` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/redisUtils.js", "server/redisUtils.fallbackcredits.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/redisUtils.fallbackcredits.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["!ok + movie covered → {cast:fb.cast}, NO pubClient.set (no cache poison)", "network/timeout throw + movie covered → {cast} via new catch; uncovered → rethrow as today", "cache-hit + successful-fetch (strip+set EX:604800) paths byte-unchanged; finally unchanged", "tv never consults fallback; fallback path no network/no Redis write", "personcredits.test.js unchanged green, npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: resolveCandidates failure-only fallback branches
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When the direct-ID details fetch OR the fuzzy search fetch fails (throw OR !ok), resolve from the local DB (by id / by title) instead of propagating to elimination. Healthy fetch paths byte-unchanged.

**Files:** Modify server/systems/matchSystem.js (resolveCandidates L359-413; add top-level `const fallbackMovies=require('./fallbackMovies')`; add private `_fallbackCandidate(entry)` above L359). Create server/systems/matchSystem.fallback.test.js.

**Key facts:** `_fallbackCandidate(entry)`→{id:entry.id,media_type:'movie',name:entry.title,title:entry.title,release_date:`${entry.year}-01-01`,first_air_date:undefined,poster_path:null}. Direct path (L365-381): wrap fetch+`.json()` in try; add `if(!detailsRes.ok) throw`; the live `topCandidates=[{...}]` assignment BYTE-UNCHANGED inside try; catch: if direct.mediaType==='movie' and fb=getFallbackById(direct.id) → topCandidates=[_fallbackCandidate(fb)]; else stays [] (existing typo/elim). Fuzzy path (L384-410): wrap fetch+`.json()` in try; add `if(!searchRes.ok) throw`; live filter(person)/theme-filter/levenshtein-sort/slice(0,5) BYTE-UNCHANGED inside try; catch: map allFallback() to {id,title,media_type:'movie',release_date:`${y}-01-01`,_entry}, apply SAME themesSystem.matchesTheme filter when room.theme&&!=='any', sort by levenshtein(title.toLowerCase(),movie.toLowerCase()), slice(0,5).map(r=>_fallbackCandidate(r._entry)). Reuse existing private levenshtein(L55)+themesSystem (no dup). Tests: direct throw+covered→exact live-shape candidate; direct !ok+uncovered→[]; fuzzy throw+title covered→levenshtein-ranked local; healthy direct unchanged + fallback never consulted.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/matchSystem.fallback.test.js` PASS; matchSystem.test.js + matchSystem.botmove.test.js unchanged PASS; `npm test` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/matchSystem.js", "server/systems/matchSystem.fallback.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/matchSystem.fallback.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["direct fetch throw/!ok + id covered → _fallbackCandidate (exact live shape); uncovered/tv → [] (existing path)", "fuzzy fetch throw/!ok → levenshtein+theme-filtered allFallback top5 as candidates; uncovered → []", "healthy direct + fuzzy paths (json/theme/sort/slice) byte-unchanged; fallback only on fetch/!ok failure", "levenshtein+themesSystem reused not duplicated; top-level require ./fallbackMovies (no cycle)", "matchSystem.test.js + matchSystem.botmove.test.js unchanged green, npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Simulated-outage integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end: with TMDB fully unavailable (global.fetch rejects), a covered connecting movie submit is NOT eliminated, an uncovered movie still IS (unchanged), and a covered direct-ID bot move survives.

**Files:** Create server/systems/fallbackMovies.integration.test.js.

**Key facts:** jest.mock('../redisUtils'); getLobby/acquireSubmitLock/releaseSubmitLock/saveLobby mocked; getOrFetchCredits re-pointed to REAL via jest.requireActual so the real Phase 5b credits fallback runs; ctx.pubClient={get:async()=>null,set:async()=>'OK',del:async()=>1} (cache-miss so real getOrFetchCredits reaches its fetch); global.fetch.mockRejectedValue (full outage); jest.spyOn(fallbackMovies,'getFallbackById') for covered/uncovered. Tests: (1) covered movie #2 sharing actor 42 with chain last → submitMovie → chain.length 2, player alive; (2) uncovered (getFallbackById→null) → player eliminated (unchanged); (3) covered bot direct-ID (currentTurnIndex bot) → submitBotMove → chain grows, bot alive. This asserts over Tasks 2+3 already implemented — if a behavioral assertion fails it's a Task 2/3 gap (fix impl, never weaken assertions); if the real getOrFetchCredits isn't executing (auto-mock shadow) repair only the requireActual/mock wiring. Also `node -e require(fallbackMovies/redisUtils/matchSystem)` → load ok.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/fallbackMovies.integration.test.js` PASS; `npm test` fully green; module-load `load ok`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/fallbackMovies.integration.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/fallbackMovies.integration.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full TMDB outage: covered connecting movie submit → chain grows, player NOT eliminated", "same outage: uncovered movie → player eliminated (today's behavior unchanged)", "same outage: covered direct-ID bot move → chain grows, bot survives", "real getOrFetchCredits exercised via requireActual; assertions never weakened", "npm test fully green, coverage floors held, module-load cycle ok"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```
